Package microui.core.controller

Class FullSingleLineTextController

java.lang.Object
microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
public class FullSingleLineTextController extends Object
Comprehensive controller for managing single-line text input with advanced features. Provides text validation, constraint management, password mode, undo/redo functionality, and event listeners for text manipulation operations.
See Also:
  • FullSingleLineTextController.FilterMode
  • Listener

  • Constructor Details

    • FullSingleLineTextController

      public FullSingleLineTextController(String text)
      Constructs a FullSingleLineTextController with initial text.
      Parameters:
      text - the initial text content (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if text is null

    • FullSingleLineTextController

      public FullSingleLineTextController()
      Constructs a FullSingleLineTextController with empty initial text.

  • Method Details

    • getInputFilter

      public InputFilter getInputFilter()
      Returns the current input filter used for character validation.
      Returns:
      the input filter (never null)

    • setInputFilter

      public void setInputFilter(InputFilter inputFilter)
      Sets the input filter used for character validation.
      Parameters:
      inputFilter - the new input filter (must not be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if inputFilter is null

    • setOnAfterCharInsertListener

      public void setOnAfterCharInsertListener(Listener onAfterCharInsertListener)
      Sets the listener for after-character-insert events.
      Parameters:
      onAfterCharInsertListener - the listener to call after character insertion (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if listener is null

    • setOnAfterStringInsertListener

      public void setOnAfterStringInsertListener(Listener onAfterStringInsertListener)
      Sets the listener for after-string-insert events.
      Parameters:
      onAfterStringInsertListener - the listener to call after string insertion (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if listener is null

    • setOnTextChangedListener

      public void setOnTextChangedListener(Listener onTextChangedListener)
      Sets the listener for text-changed events.
      Parameters:
      onTextChangedListener - the listener to call when text changes (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if listener is null

    • setOnHistoryChangedListener

      public final void setOnHistoryChangedListener(Listener onHistoryChangedListener)
      Sets the listener for history-changed events (undo/redo operations).
      Parameters:
      onHistoryChangedListener - the listener to call when history changes (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if listener is null

    • undo

      public void undo()
      Performs an undo operation, reverting to the previous text state.

    • redo

      public void redo()
      Performs a redo operation, reapplying the next text state.

      public final char getPasswordChar()
      Returns the character used for password masking.
      Returns:
      the password masking character

    • setPasswordChar

      public final void setPasswordChar(char passwordChar)
      Sets the character used for password masking.
      Parameters:
      passwordChar - the character to use for password masking

    • isPasswordModeEnabled

      public final boolean isPasswordModeEnabled()
      Checks if password mode is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if password mode is enabled, false otherwise

    • setPasswordModeEnabled

      public final void setPasswordModeEnabled(boolean passwordModeEnabled)
      Enables or disables password mode.
      Parameters:
      passwordModeEnabled - true to enable password masking, false to disable

    • getFilterMode

      public final FullSingleLineTextController.FilterMode getFilterMode()
      Returns the current filter mode used for character validation.
      Returns:
      the filter mode (never null)

    • setFilterMode

      public final void setFilterMode(FullSingleLineTextController.FilterMode filterMode)
      Sets the filter mode for character validation.
      Parameters:
      filterMode - the new filter mode (must not be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if filterMode is null

    • isConstrainEnabled

      public final boolean isConstrainEnabled()
      Checks if character constraints are enabled.
      Returns:
      true if constraints are enabled, false otherwise

    • setConstrainEnabled

      public final void setConstrainEnabled(boolean constrainEnabled)
      Enables or disables character length constraints.
      Parameters:
      constrainEnabled - true to enable length constraints, false to disable

    • getMaxChars

      public final int getMaxChars()
      Returns the maximum allowed characters when constraints are enabled.
      Returns:
      the maximum character limit

    • setMaxChars

      public final void setMaxChars(int maxChars)
      Sets the maximum allowed characters when constraints are enabled.
      Parameters:
      maxChars - the maximum character limit (must be в‰Ґ MIN_CONSTRAIN_VALUE 1)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if maxChars is less than MIN_CONSTRAIN_VALUE 1

    • getAsString

      public final String getAsString()
      Returns the text content as a string. Returns password-masked text if password mode is enabled.
      Returns:
      the text content (masked if in password mode)

    • getHiddenText

      public final String getHiddenText()
      Returns the hidden (unmasked) text content.
      Returns:
      the actual text content without password masking

    • getDigitsStrict

      public final int getDigitsStrict()
      Returns the text content parsed as an integer.
      Returns:
      the text content as an integer

    • getDigitsOrDefault

      public int getDigitsOrDefault(int defaultValue)
      Returns the text content parsed as an integer, or a default value if parsing fails.
      Parameters:
      defaultValue - the default value to return if parsing fails
      Returns:
      the parsed integer or defaultValue if parsing fails

    • insert

      public final void insert(int pos, char ch)
      Inserts a character at the specified position.
      Parameters:
      pos - the position to insert at (will be constrained to valid range)
      ch - the character to insert

    • insert

      public final void insert(int pos, String text)
      Inserts a string at the specified position.
      Parameters:
      pos - the position to insert at (will be constrained to valid range)
      text - the string to insert

    • insert

      public final void insert(int pos, int num)
      Inserts a number at the specified position.
      Parameters:
      pos - the position to insert at (will be constrained to valid range)
      num - the number to insert (converted to string)

    • set

      public final void set(String text)
      Sets the text content, replacing any existing text.
      Parameters:
      text - the new text content

    • set

      public final void set(StringBuilder text)
      Sets the text content from a StringBuilder, replacing any existing text.
      Parameters:
      text - the StringBuilder containing new text content

    • clear

      public final void clear()
      Clears all text content. If the internal buffer capacity exceeds MAX_CAPACITY_FOR_CLEAR (100), trims the buffer.

    • removeCharAt

      public final void removeCharAt(int pos)
      Removes a character at the specified position.
      Parameters:
      pos - the position of the character to remove (will be constrained to valid range)

    • remove

      public final void remove(int firstChar, int lastChar)
      Removes characters between specified positions.
      Parameters:
      firstChar - the starting position (inclusive, will be constrained)
      lastChar - the ending position (exclusive, will be constrained)

    • removeFirstChar

      public final void removeFirstChar()
      Removes the first character.

    • removeLastChar

      public final void removeLastChar()
      Removes the last character.

    • length

      public final int length()
      Returns the length of the text content.
      Returns:
      the number of characters in the text

    • isEmpty

      public final boolean isEmpty()
      Checks if the text content is empty.
      Returns:
      true if length is 0, false otherwise

    • isValidationEnabled

      public final boolean isValidationEnabled()
      Checks if text validation is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if validation is enabled, false otherwise

    • setValidationEnabled

      public final void setValidationEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables text validation.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to enable validation, false to disable

    • isValidChar

      public final boolean isValidChar(char ch)
      Validates if a character is allowed based on the current validation mode.
      Parameters:
      ch - the character to validate
      Returns:
      true if the character is valid, false otherwise
